title: Multiple accounts on Twitter
body: ![](http://es.splitweet.com/images/logo.png "Splitweet logo") [Splitweet](http://es.splitweet.com/) is another service, in this case from Catalan creators, that allows you to manage several [Twitter](/tag/twitter/) accounts from the same interface. Very useful, for example, for administrators of company accounts. In this case it is not another application for your mobile or desktop, or a plugin like TwitterFox, with [Splitweet](http://es.splitweet.com/) we view and manage all our accounts in a fairly usable web interface, although it has an **unforgivable** problem, it refreshes the entire page periodically and despite warning you when it does, the post you are writing disappears.
